title: US Alien Registration Rule Explained: What It Means For Immigrants
summary_full: The US Department of Homeland Security has finalised its alien registration rule, requiring certain non-citizens, including children turning 14, to register and provide biometric data, while most existing H-1B holders remain exempt from fresh registration.
